debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
f : U → V
g : V → U
h : g ∘ f = id
⊢ image g ∘ image f = id

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  have h1 : ∀ (s : Set U), (Set.image g (Set.image f s) : Set U) = s := by
    intro s
    have h2 : ∀ (x : U), x ∈ Set.image g (Set.image f s) ↔ x ∈ s := by
      intro x
      constructor
      · -- Prove the forward direction: if x ∈ Set.image g (Set.image f s), then x ∈ s
        intro hx
        simp only [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_image] at hx ⊢
        obtain ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩ := hx
        obtain ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩ := hy
        have h3 : g (f z) = z := by
          have h4 : (g ∘ f) z = z := by
            have h5 : (g ∘ f) z = z := by
              rw [h]
              <;> simp
            exact h5
          simp [Function.comp_apply] at h4 ⊢
          <;> exact h4
        have h6 : y = z := by
          simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
          <;> aesop
        simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
        <;> aesop
      · -- Prove the reverse direction: if x ∈ s, then x ∈ Set.image g (Set.image f s)
        intro hx
        simp only [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_image]
        refine' ⟨f x, _, x, hx, _⟩
        <;> simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
        <;>
        (try
          {
            have h3 : g (f x) = x := by
              have h4 : (g ∘ f) x = x := by
                have h5 : (g ∘ f) x = x := by
                  rw [h]
                  <;> simp
                exact h5
              simp [Function.comp_apply] at h4 ⊢
              <;> exact h4
            simp_all [Function.comp_apply]
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            aesop
          })
    -- Use the above equivalence to prove the set equality
    apply Set.Subset.antisymm
    · -- Prove Set.image g (Set.image f s) ⊆ s
      intro x hx
      have h3 := h2 x
      simp only [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_image] at h3 ⊢
      tauto
    · -- Prove s ⊆ Set.image g (Set.image f s)
      intro x hx
      have h3 := h2 x
      simp only [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_image] at h3 ⊢
      tauto
  
  -- Use the above lemma to prove the main statement
  funext s
  have h4 := h1 s
  simp only [Function.comp_apply, Set.image_image] at h4 ⊢
  <;>
  (try
    {
      aesop
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
      <;> aesop
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
      <;> aesop
    })
